title: Unified versioning & upstream sync
description: Synced with OpenCode upstream v1.2.6, unified all dependency versioning into sandbox/package.json, added changelog system so users see what changed before updating.

changes.text: Changelog system — see what's new before updating
Live update now also updates CLI binary and agent-browser
Python dependencies managed centrally via package.json
Unified release script — one command publishes everything
All versions read from sandbox/package.json (single source of truth)
Dockerfile and postinstall.sh both read versions from package.json
Fixed s6 service path in postinstall (s6-rc.d not services.d)
Removed stale build version from health endpoint
Fixed agent-browser version conflict (aligned to ^0.10.0)
Synced with OpenCode v1.2.6 (Database/Drizzle migration, 145 commits)

title: Stability & pip dependency management
description: Bug fixes, branding polish, added centralized pip package management to postinstall.

changes.text: Pip packages managed via postinstall.sh
Various stability fixes

title: Browser automation & skills system
description: Added agent-browser integration, skills framework, secret store, and LSS semantic search.

changes.text: Agent browser integration for web automation
Skills framework for extensible agent capabilities
Secret store for secure credential management
Local semantic search (LSS) integration
s6-overlay service management

title: Live update system
description: Introduced the sandbox live update system with kortix-master proxy and s6 service management.

changes.text: Sandbox live update system via npm
kortix-master proxy server
Environment variable management

title: Project scanning
description: Added Project.scan() for automatic git repo discovery in workspace.

changes.text: Project.scan() — automatic git repo discovery

title: Initial release
description: First sandbox release with basic OpenCode integration.

changes.text: Initial sandbox release with OpenCode integration
